title: galeopsis × bruggeri
intro: Galeopsis × bruggeri, also known as Brugger's galeopsis, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Galeopsis, a type of perennial flowering plant. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Galeopsis × bruggeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
